results.title: Forex reserve stands at $34.32b
results.description: Bangladesh's foreign exchange reserves stood at $34.32 billion, according to the latest data released by the Bangladesh Bank (BB) on Tuesday. The central bank said that under the International Monetary Fund's (IMF) Balance of Payments and International Investment Position Manual (BPM-6) accounting standard, the country's reserves were recorded at $29.67 billion. Officials noted that the... Details
